description: Case style: Analog watch with a rectangular stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Purple dial with metallic hands Strap style: Stainless steel strap with a linked design and butterfly clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the bottom right corner on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
